positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial landscape featuring a stylized crescent moon, swirling nebula clouds of deep indigo and sapphire blue, and scattered constellations rendered as geometric gold line art. The composition should be centrally focused, featuring a large, abstract celestial body dominating the upper half. Use a modern, minimalist graphic novel aesthetic with strong, clear silhouettes and vibrant, yet muted cosmic colors. The print should evoke wonder and mystery, utilizing negative space effectively for high contrast on apparel fabric. Vector art style, intricate etching lines, clean edges, maximalist yet balanced composition. --ar 1:1 --style graphic --v 5.1
